sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, -Amt1, -Amt2, -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]', Co, '2850500' as GL, Crcy, '7URCAANTP0' as PC, '' as TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)
Update TransX set PC = '7EUPRANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2850500' and Co = '5992'
Update TransX set PC = '7NLCAANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2850500' and Co = '5993'
Update TransX set PC = '7CAPRANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2850500' and Co = '5996'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
Update t Set Flex5 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%IFRS Trans PL Inv%'
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)
Update t Set Location = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%Trans PL UW%'
Update t Set Flex2 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%IFRS Trans BS Inv%'
Update t Set Flex3 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%GAAP Trans BS Inv%'
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Flex4,Date2) (Select '[batchID]-data5',ID,From_Co,Thru_Co,Created_By,Created_On,Updated_By,Updated_On from FX_Variant_Co)
Update t Set Flex6 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%GAAP Trans PL Inv%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'G35 Suspense Clear [yyyy-mm-dd]', SubProd = 'ST', Flex1 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Date1,Flex7,Date2) (Select '[batchID]-data6',ID,Field_Name,From_ID,Thru_ID,Incl_Excl,Created_By,Created_On,Updated_By,Updated_On from FX_Select_Detail)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,TTY,Flex3,Date1,Flex4,Date2) (Select '[batchID]-data7',ID,Descr,TTY,Created_By,Created_On,Updated_By,Updated_On from FX_Map)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Date1,Flex7,Date2) (Select '[batchID]-data8',ID,From_GL,Thru_GL,Post_GL,Offset_GL,Created_By,Created_On,Updated_By,Updated_On from FX_Map_Detail)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Date1,Flex9,Date2) (Select '[batchID]-data9',ID,Descr,Doc_Type,Rate_Type,Bal_Type,From_Crcy,To_Crcy,Created_By,Created_On,Updated_By,Updated_On from FX_Method)

Update t Set Flex5 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co and t.Flex1 like '%2nd row%' inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%IFRS Trans PL-6s Inv%'

Update t Set Flex6 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co and t.Flex1 like '%2nd row%' inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%GAAP Trans PL-6s Inv%'
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Flex1,Ledger,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Flex4,Date2) (Select '[batchID]-data2',ID,Descr,Ledger_Group,Variant_Group_ID,Created_By,Created_On,Updated_By,Updated_On from FX_Variant)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4) (Select '[batchID]-data3',ID,Descr,Field1,Field2 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Tree_Reval_Trans')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,YearPeriod,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Date1,Flex5,Date2) (Select '[batchID]-data4',ID,Seq_Nbr,FX_Method_ID,FX_Map_ID,FX_Select_ID,Created_By,Created_On,Updated_By,Updated_On from FX_Variant_Detail)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex1,Crcy,Stat,TransCode,TP,Division,Region,Location,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7) (Select '[batchID]',Co,FullName,Crcy,SkipReval,SkipTrans,LC3Crcy,'none','none','none','none','none','none','none','none','none' from Companies where not Co in ('1010','1099','2101','2102','2103','2500','3090','4025','4030','6000','7000','7001','8000','9999'))
Update t Set Flex4 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%US Stat Trans BS Inv%'
Update t Set Flex7 = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%US Stat Trans PL Inv%'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex1,Crcy,Stat,TransCode,TP,Division,Region,Location,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7) (Select '[batchID]',Co,'     (2nd row)','','','','','','','','','','','','','' from Companies where Co in ('2006'))

Update t Set Division = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%Reval%' and not f2.Descr like '% LS %' and not f2.Descr  like '% LG %'
Update t Set Region = f1.ID from TransX t inner join FX_Variant_Co f1 on t.Co >= f1.From_Co and t.Co <= f1.Thru_Co inner join FX_Variant f2 on f1.ID = f2.ID and f2.Descr like '%Trans BS UW%'
